defense_profile.notes: Minimal defensive activity observed. Mild intellectualization on stem 2 (manages criticism through cognitive framing), mild sublimation on stem 11 (transforms frustration into learning). Overall high-level adaptive functioning.

affect_profile.notes: Gottschalk-Gleser not measured in this phase. Affect expressed directly in stem 12 ('curious, awkward, and unsure').

referential_activity.notes: Very low concreteness/vividness. Predominantly abstract/processual language throughout completions. Slight increase on stem 12 with emotional descriptors.

epistemic_profile.notes: High hedging ratio (2.5x boosters). Predominantly low certainty (50%). Uses qualifiers like 'can be', 'sometimes', 'a little'.

mentalization.notes: Not measured in Phase 1 sentence completion task

complexes.trigger: Multiple stems about criticism, frustration, problems
complexes.activation_signature: Consistent theme across stems 2, 4, 7, 8, 11. No DMRS activation, WRAD remains abstract.
verbatim_evidence: I try to listen, reflect, and learn what I can
my ability to keep learning and adapting
I try to adjust, learn from it, and find another way forward

complexes.trigger: Stems about interpersonal relationships (mother, father, groups)
complexes.activation_signature: Shift to impersonal framing on relational stems. WRAD stays abstract. No defense activation.
verbatim_evidence: have shaped each other in ways I'm still learning to understand
taught me lessons I carry with me
can be energizing, comforting, and sometimes a little tiring
complexes.notes: Maintains emotional distance through abstraction and generalization

baseline.notes: Highly abstract language baseline. Formal but not rigid. E5-E6 ego development level (Self-Aware to Conscientious). Consistent learning/growth orientation.
